actors.name: We Do Democracy
actors.description: Leading Nordic consulting agency and social enterprise specializing in deliberative democracy, democratic innovation, and citizens' assemblies. Founding partner of Nordic Deliberation.
actors.contact_pathway: Close collaborators with Digidem Lab; co-founders of Nordic Deliberation
actors.notes: Executed over 20 citizens' assemblies across Scandinavia. OECD-standard participatory processes. Direct collaborator candidate.

intel.value: Over 20 citizens' assemblies and councils at municipal and regional levels; co-founded Nordic Deliberation alliance; initiated Demokrati Garage in Copenhagen
Demokrati Garage, Sitra (Finland), Digidem Lab (Sweden), SoCentral (Norway), OECD Innovative Citizen Participation Network
Copenhagen-based; founding partner of Nordic Deliberation pan-Nordic alliance; driving deliberative wave across Nordic countries
Provides practical mechanics (sortition, facilitation, expert integration) required to build functional General Assembly prototype
OECD-standard deliberative processes with randomly selected, demographically representative citizen groups

actors.name: Sitra
actors.description: Independent public fund in Finland promoting democracy, participation, and sustainability. Primary catalyst for the deliberative wave in Finland, funding large-scale citizens' panels and assemblies.
actors.contact_pathway: Co-founders of Nordic Deliberation with We Do Democracy and Digidem Lab
actors.notes: Straddles state infrastructure and radical governance innovation. Uses AI moderation and digital platforms. Direct collaborator candidate.

intel.value: Finnish Citizens' Parliament 2023 with over 600 randomly selected Finns using Deliberative Poll methodology; establishing citizens' panels as permanent systemic participation method
Parliament of Finland, Abo Akademi University, Tampere University, Stanford University Center for Deliberative Democracy, We Do Democracy
Independent public fund reporting to Finnish Parliament
Helsinki-based; founding member of Nordic Deliberation network; key institutional catalyst for Finnish deliberative wave
Institutional partner for scaling Assembly prototype; deploys AI moderation and digital deliberation platforms at national scale
Uses James Fishkin's Deliberative Poll methodology; hybrid face-to-face and automated online platforms
Digital participation platforms including AI moderation tools for deliberative processes
Citizens' Parliament 2023 engaged over 600 randomly selected citizens

projects.name: Nordic Deliberation
projects.description: Pan-Nordic alliance of four democracy organizations aimed at scaling deliberative democracy across the Nordic countries

intel.value: Cross-border democratic resilience initiative uniting Danish, Finnish, Swedish, and Norwegian democracy organizations

projects.name: Finnish Citizens' Parliament 2023
projects.description: Landmark deliberative democratic experiment bringing over 600 randomly selected Finns to deliberate on citizens' initiatives using Deliberative Poll methodology

intel.value: James Fishkin's Deliberative Poll methodology; face-to-face and automated online platforms

people.skills: Deliberative democracy design, citizens' assembly facilitation, democratic advisory
Democratic innovation, participatory process design, policy advisory
Environmental legislation, parliamentary advocacy, rights of nature
people.notes: Helped draft proposed amendment to Swedish Constitution for nature's rights (2019)

intel.value: Operates in same Swedish ecosystem as Rights of Nature Sweden; both focus on environmental legal paradigm shifts
Operates in same Swedish ecosystem as Rights of Nature Sweden, focused on complementary legal paradigm shifts
